Appearances:
Plaintiff Tenderloin Health, present
Attorney, Arnold Evje, Esq., appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant, Robert Older, is present.
Attorney, . representing the defendant through limited scope.
The Judge Pro Stan Bair, litigants and counsel confer privately in Dept. 306, for settlement discussions.

The parties enter into a signed Judgment pursuant to stipulation which is filed with the court.
This case settled, the trial date of NOV-1-2010 is vacated.
